headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' https://www.soundhelix.com https://www.soundjay.com blob:; connect-src 'self' https://www.googleapis.com https://api.audd.io https://api.acoustid.org https://accounts.spotify.com https://api.spotify.com https://ws.audioscrobbler.com; frame-ancestors 'none';
